title: The Dual-Use Gap
whyItMatters: TLDR: So there has been recent discourse on 𝕏 , and recent news of major cyber attacks that were done with the help of AI. The missing frame here is the dual-use gap : as AI models become more capable, they create more upside for defenders and more downside for attackers. The gap between the benefits and the harmful effects is getting wider. I know that so…
